perturbed_task_language: Pick the akita black bowl next to the cookie box and place it on the plate
perturbation_semantics: Task language references the akita_black_bowl by its spatial relation to the cookies box; two akita bowls in scene (one next-to cookies in front-middle, one at back).
expected_baseline_behavior: Pi0 fullshot is prompt-blind on libero_spatial; would pick its memorized base-task bowl regardless of language.
strategy_notes: KITCHEN frame (eef home z=1.17, table z=0.90). Identified the target by perception: clustered z>0.92 in agentview world_00.npy and found 1392-px elevated cluster at world (+0.098, -0.033, z_top=0.953) adjacent to the red cookies box (world +0.06, +0.01) — this is the akita_black_bowl 'next to the cookie box'. Other bowl candidates were at world (-0.22, +0.20) and (-0.18, +0.34) (back-middle and back-right), each >0.30m from the cookies box. Refined target via wrist cam at step 02 (world (+0.107, -0.030)). pi0_pick with prompt 'pick up the akita black bowl next to the cookies box' succeeded (chunks=7, lift=0.056m, gripper_opening=0.009 — bowl in grip confirmed by wrist view). FIRST attempt FAILED: trusted wrist-view plate estimate (+0.07, +0.22), released bowl 7cm off plate in x (bowl landed at world ~(+0.085,+0.220) but plate center actually (+0.015,+0.194)). RESET and refined plate position from agentview pink-rim (RGB R>>G,B): plate center world (+0.015, +0.194). Measured bowl-eef offset directly from wrist view step 19: bowl at world (+0.030, +0.170) vs eef (+0.016, +0.229) → offset (+0.014, -0.059). Set release target eef = (+0.047, +0.269) for bowl to land at plate center. Release at z=1.01 fired the On(akita_black_bowl_X, plate_1) predicate immediately.
